Any tips on corpo build? I paired her with gmurphy

Gmurphy herself can just blast down bosses herself. But you might want to include a unit that can force hard discards. Corpo is mostly a tank, with some synergistic cards and an exalt that pairs well with a tentacle build. If you saw the pics I posted before where she did like 40% of the bosses hp. She did that by stacking lightening retribution three full times in a single turn, by making use of Aurita's friendship, and the ch3 unique card with bonus draw. I effectively was able to full cycle my deck several times, with full tenta slots, and turn them to red and stack up a ton of tentacle bonus damage.
My entire team is built around several combos I can use to blast out huge amounts of damage fast
Everything from stacking up cards for aurita's exalt, to red mode corpo + gmurphy. And Thais pulls double duty as a healer, exalt battery, and for her own exalt that can open up big swings

Yeah, it's a niche that he can be used in and performs well at. He's also one of GMurphy's best teammates due to her Soulforge Talent favouring Lemurian Units in particular

Pickman's E2 is also especially powerful, as its a direct upgrade to both his Exalt & 2 Cost Skill as it will now generate Skills with Advanced Orisons and Golden Relics respectively which is a massive buff to his Utility Potential
He is one of the more flexible Supports and can be a massive boon to Exalt Based Damage Dealers in particular or those that are capable of doing Multi Hit DPS

uh i have pulled caecus and thais - is this a tema i can run and who else should I pull to run with them?

If you are a new player, your strongest team will likely be Mouchette (you get a free copy of her from the event), thais, aigis (you get a free copy of her from story), and ramona. Thais and aigis together are an extremely potent support duo all the way through the endgame. Thais also works very well with mouchette. 

Ramona is a decent support option for mouchette because her exalt lets you pull mouchettes 3 cost from your deck or discard and discount it to 0.
